document_id: TOL tool for Foster Home Licensing Track Training

findings.description: Table structure altered from a form layout with spanning headers to a two-column grid.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, headers like 'Social Worker Goals' span the full width of the table. In the HTML, these are placed into the first column of a two-column ('Prompt', 'Input') table, splitting the originally merged cells.

findings.description: Form table flattened, altering visual grouping of numbered lists.
findings.evidence: The PDF groups numbered input rows (1, 2, 3) under full-width prompt rows. The HTML converts this to a strict two-column layout, placing prompts and standalone numbers into the 'Item' column.

findings.description: Form table structure converted from spanning rows to a two-column layout.
findings.evidence: A long instructional prompt spanning the table width in the PDF is placed into the first column of a two-column ('Item', 'Response') table in the HTML.

findings.description: Complex form table flattened into a simple two-column grid.
findings.evidence: Spanning textual prompts and their associated numbered input areas in the PDF are converted into a uniform two-column format in the HTML, altering the visual structure.
